label: Layout
description: Structural containers governing max-width, centering, and responsive layout behaviour.

intents.label: Max-Width Centered Container
intents.description: Horizontally centered layout container with a maximum width constraint and responsive horizontal padding.

mastors.description: Resolves max-width, auto margin-inline centering and responsive padding-inline from tokens. Content must reflow to a single column at 320px viewport width without horizontal scrolling (WCAG 1.4.10).

preview.label: container.max.centered
preview.description: Max-width constrained, horizontally padded, centered layout container.

notes: Content must reflow to a single column at 320px viewport width without horizontal scrolling (WCAG 1.4.10).
Padding-inline must shrink gracefully at small viewports — use clamp() or responsive tokens.
Do not set a fixed height — allow content to expand naturally.
